chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 742 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 01.11.2023 Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Safdar Kamal, Assistant Director (Legal) NADRA, appearing for respondents No.2 to 5. M/s Mir Ali Nawaz Jagirani and Najamuddin Dharejo, Special Prosecutors NAB. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioner submits that in compliance of order dated 29.08.2023, CNIC of petitioner’s son, namely Baqir Ali, was unblocked, and as a result, he returned to Pakistan and surrendered before the Accountability Court-III, Sukkur, and has been granted interim pre-arrest bail vide order dated 31.10.2023. He has submitted a copy of this order along with a statement, and seeks disposal of this petition having been served its purpose. Accordingly, the petition stands disposed of as not pressed. Office is directed to return the security/surety to the petitioner/ surety after due verification and identification as per law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
